selection_criteria: T1D-PRODUCTION-SURGE-001 (priority 10): maximize real productivity, minimize reports, maximize reusability

candidates.problem_solved: Memory Palace has 8 entries but no automated pattern detection. Lessons are repeated manually. No way to detect recurring failures, cost trends, or grounding drift without reading all entries.
candidates.expected_value: Automated pattern detection across Memory Palace entries: recurring failures, cost anomalies, grounding trends, embryo performance drift. Reduces manual analysis from 15min to 2sec.
grounding_claims: Memory Palace has 8 entries with lessons field
Patterns repeat across entries (same lesson text)
Cost data exists per entry for trend analysis
Grounding scores exist per entry for drift detection
candidates.what_not_to_do: Do NOT modify Memory Palace itself. Do NOT write to Supabase. Do NOT call external APIs. Read-only analysis of existing data.

candidates.problem_solved: No central index of all R0+ artifacts produced across 8 epochs. T1 cannot quickly see what exists, where it is, what it does, or if it has tests. Finding artifacts requires manual directory traversal.
candidates.expected_value: Auto-discovers all R0+ artifacts by scanning directories, extracts metadata (name, path, tests, epoch, purpose), produces a consolidated index JSON. T1 can see everything in one file.
grounding_claims: Each artifact has a test file with test_ prefix
candidates.what_not_to_do: Do NOT modify existing artifacts. Do NOT create new epochs. Do NOT touch main. Read-only scan + index generation.

candidates.problem_solved: Oracle and Auditor have run 9+ cycles each but no trend analysis exists. Cannot see: cost per cycle trend, grounding improvement over time, task distribution, failure rate, or performance regression.
candidates.expected_value: Scans all Oracle/Auditor outputs and state files. Produces trend analysis: cost/cycle, grounding/cycle, task frequency, success rate, time between runs. Detects regressions automatically.
grounding_claims: Output files have timestamps and cost fields
Grounding scores are in each output JSON
Auditor outputs reference oracle outputs for cross-analysis
candidates.what_not_to_do: Do NOT modify embryo code. Do NOT run embryos. Do NOT call providers. Read-only analysis of existing output files and state.

candidates.problem_solved: 8 epochs have been executed but no cross-epoch value comparison exists. Cannot answer: which epoch produced most value? Which had lowest cost? Which introduced most tests?
candidates.expected_value: Scans all epoch directories, extracts metrics (files created, tests added, cost, artifacts produced, grounding scores), produces comparative report. Identifies highest-value and lowest-value epochs.
grounding_claims: Each epoch has CHAIN_LOG.jsonl with cost data
Each epoch has DECLARATION.md with metadata
candidates.what_not_to_do: Do NOT create new epochs. Do NOT modify existing epoch files. Read-only analysis.

candidates.problem_solved: T1 Directive Conflict Resolver exists but produces no human-readable report. T1 cannot quickly see: which directives conflict, how they were resolved, what was suppressed.
candidates.expected_value: Reads directive queue, runs conflict resolution, produces human-readable report with conflict matrix, resolution decisions, and recommendations. Useful for T1 visibility into directive system health.
candidates.what_not_to_do: Do NOT modify the conflict resolver. Do NOT modify the directive queue. Read-only reporting.
